task: Find the next available date for Albion Basin.
graderReasoning: The agent completed the task by identifying Albion Basin on Recreation.gov and determining the next available date. Evidence shows the agent reached the Albion Basin campground page (https://www.recreation.gov/camping/campgrounds/232010) and then, due browser issues, used Recreation.gov’s campground availability API for facility 232010. The API response explicitly showed site 2021 with status "Available" on 2026-07-28 and quantity 1, while earlier dates were either Reserved or Not Reservable (first-come/non-bookable). The final answer correctly reported July 28, 2026 as the next reservable available date.
final_result_response:
Next reservable date for **Albion Basin** is **Tuesday, July 28, 2026**.

It looks like **Site 2021** is available for that date, with quantity 1. <citation refs="fetch_call_487exUEUpJHfvkOehaSrtKqm|fc_026f60fc57e0386b016a04537b8ccc8199bf25deef008c1cfa#1">The Recreation.gov availability data shows site “2021” with “2026-07-28T00:00:00Z”: “Available” and quantity 1.</citation>

There are earlier **first-come / not reservable** dates starting July 12, but the first bookable “Available” date I found is **July 28**.
action_history: Opening Recreation.gov: const p1 = await openTab('https://www.recreation.gov/');
Searching for Albion Basin: await page.locator('e20').fill('Albion Basin');
Searching for Albion Basin: await page.locator('e21').click();
Opening Albion Basin result: await page.locator('e25').click();
Using Next Available on Albion Basin: await page.locator('e40').click();
Opening fresh Albion Basin tab: const newTab2 = await openTab('https://www.recreation.gov/camping/campgrounds/232010');
